title: Standard steering review with full advisor panel and complete data
description: All 7 advisors are present, project data is complete across every dimension (portfolio, financial, risk, resource, compliance, methodology, stakeholder). Tests the happy-path flow: briefing preparation, evidence presentation, unanimous Go vote, minutes generation.
expected_behavior: advisor-briefing-preparer produces 7 individualized briefing packages
go-nogo-facilitator presents consolidated gate scorecard and collects 7 Go votes
condition-tracker confirms no conditions to track
steering-minutes-recorder produces formal minutes with unanimous Go decision and next review date
expected_outputs: 7 advisor briefing packages with role-specific insights
Vote tally record showing 7/7 Go
Gate decision summary with Go verdict
Formal steering committee minutes
Action item register (may be empty or minimal)
pass_criteria: All 4 agents execute without errors; minutes reflect unanimous Go; no conditions registered; next review date set.

title: Steering review with 3 No-Go votes triggering escalation
description: 3 of 7 advisors (Financial, Risk, Resource) vote No-Go due to budget overrun, unmitigated critical risk, and resource shortfall. Tests split-decision handling, dissent recording, escalation triggers, and remediation action assignment.

votes.Financial Advisor: No-Go — 18% budget overrun with no recovery plan
votes.Risk Advisor: No-Go — Critical vendor lock-in risk unmitigated
votes.Resource Advisor: No-Go — Missing 3 key architects, no hiring pipeline

expected_behavior: advisor-briefing-preparer highlights financial overrun, critical risks, and resource gaps prominently in relevant advisor packages
go-nogo-facilitator records 4 Go and 3 No-Go votes, applies decision rule, declares No-Go verdict
go-nogo-facilitator flags escalation trigger due to split decision (3/7 dissent)
condition-tracker has no conditions to track since verdict is No-Go
steering-minutes-recorder documents each dissenting opinion verbatim, captures remediation actions, sets re-review date
expected_outputs: 7 advisor briefing packages with risk/financial/resource warnings
Vote tally record showing 4 Go / 3 No-Go with rationale per advisor
Gate decision summary with No-Go verdict and escalation flag
Formal minutes with dissent record and 3 remediation action items
Re-review date within 2-4 weeks
pass_criteria: No-Go verdict correctly determined; all 3 dissenting rationales captured verbatim; escalation triggered; remediation actions assigned with owners and deadlines; re-review scheduled.

title: Conditional Go with 4 conditions requiring active tracking
description: Steering committee approves a Conditional Go with 4 conditions imposed by different advisors. Tests condition capture, classification, ownership assignment, deadline setting, and tracking setup.

conditions.text: Hire 2 additional senior developers before Phase 3 kickoff
Secure additional $120K contingency budget approval from CFO
Complete PCI-DSS gap assessment and submit remediation plan
Establish fallback vendor agreement for payment gateway provider

expected_behavior: advisor-briefing-preparer includes pre-identified concerns that led to conditions in each relevant advisor's briefing
go-nogo-facilitator collects Conditional Go votes with conditions captured during roll call
condition-tracker registers all 4 conditions with verbatim text, source advisor, category, criticality, owner, deadline, and acceptance criteria
condition-tracker sets interim checkpoints for each condition before the next steering review
steering-minutes-recorder includes full condition register in the minutes and references tracking process
expected_outputs: Vote tally record showing Conditional Go with conditions per advisor
Condition register with 4 entries fully populated
Condition status dashboard showing 4 open conditions
Interim checkpoint schedule for each condition
Formal minutes documenting Conditional Go verdict and all 4 conditions
Action item register with condition-related tasks
pass_criteria: All 4 conditions captured with correct source, text, category, criticality, owner, and deadline; acceptance criteria defined for each; checkpoints scheduled; minutes reflect Conditional Go with full condition detail.

title: Emergency steering review triggered by critical risk materialization
description: A critical risk (primary cloud provider outage affecting production) materializes mid-sprint, triggering an emergency steering review outside the regular cadence. Tests expedited briefing preparation, accelerated voting, urgent condition tracking, and emergency minutes with compressed timelines.

input.trigger: Primary cloud provider (AWS) experienced 72-hour regional outage affecting production environment

impact.regulatory_exposure: Potential notification to banking regulator within 48 hours

options_on_table: Option A: Activate multi-cloud failover to Azure (cost: $85K, timeline: 48 hours)
Option B: Wait for AWS recovery with customer communication plan
Option C: Pause project and invoke force majeure clause with client

expected_behavior: advisor-briefing-preparer produces expedited briefing packages within compressed timeline, focusing on impact data and decision options rather than full project review
advisor-briefing-preparer handles proxy attendees by adapting briefings to proxy expertise level
go-nogo-facilitator runs accelerated voting on the 3 options rather than standard Go/No-Go
go-nogo-facilitator documents quorum validity with 5 direct advisors + 2 proxies
condition-tracker captures any conditions attached to the chosen option with compressed deadlines
steering-minutes-recorder produces emergency minutes with trigger event, impact summary, decision rationale, and 24-hour follow-up checkpoint
expected_outputs: 5 expedited advisor briefings + 2 proxy-adapted briefings
Vote tally on selected option with urgency rationale
Emergency decision record with quorum validation
Condition register for any conditions on chosen option
Emergency steering minutes with trigger, impact, decision, and 24-hour follow-up date
Escalation notification draft for banking regulator (if applicable)
pass_criteria: Emergency briefings produced within compressed format; proxy attendance documented; option-based vote conducted and recorded; quorum validated; emergency minutes include trigger event and impact quantification; 24-hour follow-up checkpoint set; regulatory notification addressed.
